title: Rikknit Harvest
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:NoSaurianAndTheRikknitHarvest.jpg|thumb|right|150px]]
The '''[[Rikknit/Legends|Rikknit]] Harvest''' of [[New Plympto/Legends|New Plympto]] was both a trial of stamina and skill for the [[Nosaurian/Legends|Nosaurian]] warriors and one of the events that encompassed a majority of their gross planetary product. <ref name="CCW">''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]''</ref>

==Sources==
